creator: theo.van.klaveren@ats-global.com
text:
Yup, crash is at the TAILQ_INSERT_TAIL, line 4835:

#19 0xc0a89eb0 in fork_trampoline () at /usr/src/sys/i386/i386/exception.s:264

$2 = {sim_action = 0xc046af70 <dead_sim_action>,
